label: Composer (PHP)
description: Keep Composer install/update results, warnings, and dependency errors.

patterns: Your requirements could not be resolved

includePatterns: Your requirements could not be resolved

errorPatterns: Your requirements could not be resolved

tests.name: successful install
tests.input:
Loading composer repositories with package information
Updating dependencies
Lock file operations: 5 installs, 0 updates, 0 removals
  - Locking laravel/framework (v11.0.0)
Writing lock file
Installing dependencies from lock file (including require-dev)
Package operations: 5 installs, 0 updates, 0 removals
  - Downloading laravel/framework (v11.0.0)
  - Installing laravel/framework (v11.0.0)
Generating optimized autoload files
tests.expected:
Package operations: 5 installs, 0 updates, 0 removals
  - Installing laravel/framework (v11.0.0)
Generating optimized autoload files

tests.name: dependency conflict
tests.input:
Your requirements could not be resolved to an installable set of packages.

  Problem 1
    - laravel/framework[v11.0.0] requires php ^8.2 but your php version (8.1.0) does not satisfy that requirement.
tests.expected:
Your requirements could not be resolved to an installable set of packages.
  Problem 1
    - laravel/framework[v11.0.0] requires php ^8.2 but your php version (8.1.0) does not satisfy that requirement.
